'''javugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylotetrose|xylotetrose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylotetrose|xylotetrose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævigith|jævigith]] || [[word:jævigij|jævigij]] || [[word:jævigish|jævigish]] || [[word:jævigi|jævigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvuguth|javuvuguth]] || [[word:javuvuguj|javuvuguj]] || [[word:javuvugush|javuvugush]] || [[word:javuvugu|javuvugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javuguth|javuguth]] || [[word:javuguj|javuguj]] || [[word:javugush|javugush]] || [[word:javugu|javugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufguth|javufguth]] || [[word:javufguj|javufguj]] || [[word:javufgush|javufgush]] || [[word:javufguf|javufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javuguthu|javuguthu]] || [[word:javuguju|javuguju]] || [[word:javugushu|javugushu]] || [[word:javuguku|javuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javuguth|javuguth]] || [[word:javuguj|javuguj]] || [[word:javugush|javugush]] || [[word:javugu|javugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javuguthul|javuguthul]] || [[word:javugujul|javugujul]] || [[word:javugushul|javugushul]] || [[word:javugukul|javugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javuguthuthu|javuguthuthu]] || [[word:javugujuju|javugujuju]] || [[word:javugushushu|javugushushu]] || [[word:javuguku|javuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javuguthun|javuguthun]] || [[word:javugujun|javugujun]] || [[word:javugushun|javugushun]] || [[word:javugukun|javugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javuguthuoro|javuguthuoro]] || [[word:javugujuoro|javugujuoro]] || [[word:javugushuoro|javugushuoro]] || [[word:javugukuoro|javugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
